title: Integrate a real CC0 pixel-art pack behind the texture layer
description: Replace (or augment) the programmatic textures in src/game/textures.ts with a genuine CC0/public-domain pixel-art pack (e.g. Kenney) for terrain/biomes, structures and animals. Keep all art access behind the existing texture-key indirection so the scene is untouched. Add an ATTRIBUTION/licence note to the README. The hominin era-morph may stay hand-authored if no CC0 equivalent exists — say so.
verify: Game still builds and runs; biome/structure/animal sprites are sourced from a CC0 pack with attribution in the README; src/game/MainScene.ts changes are minimal (texture keys only); sim untouched.

title: Refine the 9-stage hominin morph (shading, silhouettes, animation hint)
description: Improve the per-era human sprite in src/game/textures.ts: cleaner silhouettes, better shading/dithering, a subtle idle bob or 2-frame walk, and clearer era-to-era clothing/tool reads. Keep textures keyed by morph signature so they stay deduped.
verify: npm run build passes; sprite textures still generated per morph key; no change to src/sim; a screenshot-able visible improvement described in AGENT_REPORT.

title: Deepen map exploration: fog-of-war + per-region discovery
description: Add lightweight exploration: regions start undiscovered and are revealed by migrating to adjacent ones (or scouting). Track discovered regions in sim state (serialize-safe) and reflect it in the map UI (src/ui/map.ts). Keep the sim pure; the map view only reads state.
verify: New unit test covers discovery state + a save/load round-trip including it; npm test/build pass; sim still reaches the Information Age; map UI shows undiscovered vs discovered regions.

title: Family tree: add a descendants view + search by id
description: Today the family tree is ancestry-focused. Add a toggle to view a focal individual's DESCENDANTS, and a small search box to jump to an individual by id. Drive entirely off existing lineage data (motherId/fatherId). No sim changes required.
verify: npm test/build pass; family-tree view offers ancestry/descendants toggle and id search; no src/sim changes; no console errors.

title: Add a soft food-storage cap so surplus can't grow unbounded
description: Mid/late game the food pool can balloon into the thousands, removing tension. Add a storage cap that scales with shelter tier / capacity (a tunable in the BALANCE block), so hoarding is bounded. Keep the autopilot able to reach the final era.
verify: New/updated test asserts food is bounded by the cap; npm test/build pass; npm run sim still reaches the Information Age within the sane year range; change confined to src/sim with a BALANCE entry.

title: Add a few choice-driven event chains
description: Add 2-3 small branching events (beyond the current one-shot hazards/bounties) that offer the player a choice with trade-offs (e.g. a hard winter: ration food vs. risk a hunt). Model them in the pure sim with a pending-choice mechanism mirroring the existing encounter API; the UI surfaces the choice.
verify: Unit tests cover each event's branches deterministically; npm test/build pass; sim still reaches the Information Age; encounter-style pending-choice pattern reused (no sim/render leak).

title: Add light era-aware ambient audio (WebAudio) and SFX, off by default
description: Extend src/ui/audio.ts with a gentle generative ambient pad that shifts subtly by era, plus a couple of SFX (birth, discovery). Must remain OFF until the player enables sound, and must never block on autoplay. Pure UI concern.
verify: npm build passes; audio stays off by default and only starts after a user gesture; no changes to src/sim; toggling sound works.

title: Cache the per-tick `living` list to cut O(n) filtering
description: Simulation.living filters the full individuals array (which grows with every birth) many times per tick. Cache the living list once per tick and invalidate on births/deaths/migration, without changing behavior. Determinism must be preserved exactly.
verify: All existing tests pass byte-identically (determinism intact: same seed → same winning year); npm build passes; a micro-benchmark or note in AGENT_REPORT shows fewer full-array scans; change confined to src/sim/simulation.ts.

title: Polish onboarding + first-session guidance
description: Improve the tutorial/first-run experience in src/ui/overlay.ts: clearer first steps, a hint pointing at the Map and Family buttons, and a dismissible 'next objective' nudge tied to state.goal. Keep it skippable and remembered in localStorage.
verify: npm build passes; tutorial still shows once and is dismissible/remembered; no sim changes; no console errors.

title: Accessibility pass: keyboard controls + contrast + ARIA
description: Add keyboard shortcuts (space=pause, 1/2/4=speed, m=map, f=family), ensure focus styles on interactive controls, check colour contrast on key text, and add ARIA labels to icon-only buttons. UI-only.
verify: npm build passes; documented keyboard shortcuts work; icon buttons have accessible labels; no sim changes.

title: Pool tribe sprites instead of create/destroy churn
description: MainScene currently destroys/creates hominin sprites as individuals come and go. Introduce a small object pool to reuse Phaser images, reducing GC churn at large populations. Render-only; behavior unchanged.
verify: npm build passes; game still renders the capped sprite set correctly; no src/sim changes; AGENT_REPORT notes the pooling approach.
